title: piper puberulum
intro: Piper puberulum, also known as the Indian long pepper or long pepper, is a type of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae). Native to the Indian subcontinent, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Piper puberulum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Piper puberulum is typically prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine and some modern herbal remedies.
